cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/csvkit/__init__.py b/csvkit/__init__.py
index ededf47..165d137 100644
--- a/csvkit/__init__.py
+++ b/csvkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def join_row(fields):
     return ",".join(fields)
+
+def quote(field):
+    if any(c in field for c in (",", '"', "\n", "\r")):
+        return '"' + field.replace('"', '""') + '"'
+    return field

cases.name: comma_only_no_double
cases.diff:
diff --git a/csvkit/__init__.py b/csvkit/__init__.py
index ededf47..314dc21 100644
--- a/csvkit/__init__.py
+++ b/csvkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def join_row(fields):
     return ",".join(fields)
+
+def quote(field):
+    if "," in field:
+        return '"' + field + '"'
+    return field

cases.name: doubles_but_misses_newline
cases.diff:
diff --git a/csvkit/__init__.py b/csvkit/__init__.py
index ededf47..3c86c9b 100644
--- a/csvkit/__init__.py
+++ b/csvkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def join_row(fields):
     return ",".join(fields)
+
+def quote(field):
+    if "," in field or '"' in field:
+        return '"' + field.replace('"', '""') + '"'
+    return field
